/INTC/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: CHERYL RICH/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 09-13-21(60TH)/NB/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THE VICTIM/X:THE COURT MAKES FURTHER FACTUAL FINDINGS ON THE RECORD,/SA1:MANISHA ANGUIANOCAN; FREDDY AGENOR RUGAM/SA2:84 HARRIET STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103/SA2:140 B STREET, SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94080/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DAWF/
